title: Sr Consultant Product Marketing
skills: 5+ years in B2B product marketing, preferably within information services or broader SaaS sectors.
Demonstrated success bringing new solutions to market and driving ongoing growth with a strong commercial acumen
Ability to translate complexity into clear customer‑facing value
Exceptional collaboration and communication skills with the ability to influence others
Exceptional collaboration and communication skills with the ability to influence others
Comfortable with autonomy, combining strategic thinking and doing the work
Passion for translating complex business problems and solutions into compelling stories
Experience setting up a regional product marketing operation
Focussed on outcomes – you are a problem solver who combines data-driven insights with creative thinking. You couple strategic approach with hands-on ownership to achieve success
Strong English speaker in a business context
It’s advantageous if you have experience working in: a matrixed global organisation and Financial Services, FinTech, lending, fraud, or regulated markets

Regional Strategy & Execution: Own and lead go-to-market strategies tailored to regional market dynamics, customer needs, and competitive landscapes. This will include supporting product launches, sales enablement, market-driven initiatives, and targeted campaigns. Establish Product Marketing as a new function within the Latin American business region, acting as the ambassador to champion the value that product marketing delivers. Implement and adapt TransUnion’s robust global product marketing framework for the Latin American region.

Content & Messaging: Develop and roll-out solution messaging, sales enablement materials, and content that captures the customer issues, market trends, and the walk to TransUnion’s value proposition. Creating narratives that uniquely position TransUnion in the market and resonate deeply with buyers. This will include materials such as pitch decks, solution brochures, customer case studies, and competitive battlecards. Build and maintain personas and ideal customer profiles that reflect the regional and vertical market nuances.

Market Intelligence: Conduct ongoing market, customer, and competitor analysis to inform positioning and product roadmaps, create powerful stories that resonate with the regional market and differentiate TransUnion’s propositions from the competition.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Influence and align stakeholders across product, sales, market development, and marketing teams to ensure go-to-market readiness across the organisation. Work tightly with the global Product Marketing team to drive and localise global launches in the Latin American market, and leverage best-practice processes and tools.
Performance Measurement: Track and report on key performance indicators to measure the impact of product marketing.
description:
About the job

TransUnion's Job Applicant Privacy Notice

What We'll Bring

At TransUnion-Buró de Crédito, we foster a collaborative, dynamic, and innovative environment, where we continuously explore new technologies and tools to stay agile. This enables our team to strengthen their skills, develop new capabilities, and reach their full potential.

We’re looking for a dynamic and strategic Senior Product Marketer to be an integral part of the growth of TransUnion’s business across the Latin America region. This role owns regional go‑to‑market strategy, delivers differentiated value propositions, and ensures successful commercial outcomes through tight cross‑functional collaboration.

You will lead both strategic and tactical product marketing activity across TransUnion’s solution portfolio and the different sectors we serve. You will foster tight collaboration across regional teams (sales, marketing, product, strategy) and work closely with your global product marketing associates.

What You'll Bring


5+ years in B2B product marketing, preferably within information services or broader SaaS sectors. 
Demonstrated success bringing new solutions to market and driving ongoing growth with a strong commercial acumen 
Ability to translate complexity into clear customer‑facing value 
Exceptional collaboration and communication skills with the ability to influence others 
Exceptional collaboration and communication skills with the ability to influence others 
Comfortable with autonomy, combining strategic thinking and doing the work 
Passion for translating complex business problems and solutions into compelling stories 
Experience setting up a regional product marketing operation 
Focussed on outcomes – you are a problem solver who combines data-driven insights with creative thinking. You couple strategic approach with hands-on ownership to achieve success 
Strong English speaker in a business context 
It’s advantageous if you have experience working in: a matrixed global organisation and Financial Services, FinTech, lending, fraud, or regulated markets 


Impact You'll Make


Regional Strategy & Execution: Own and lead go-to-market strategies tailored to regional market dynamics, customer needs, and competitive landscapes. This will include supporting product launches, sales enablement, market-driven initiatives, and targeted campaigns. Establish Product Marketing as a new function within the Latin American business region, acting as the ambassador to champion the value that product marketing delivers. Implement and adapt TransUnion’s robust global product marketing framework for the Latin American region. 
Content & Messaging: Develop and roll-out solution messaging, sales enablement materials, and content that captures the customer issues, market trends, and the walk to TransUnion’s value proposition. Creating narratives that uniquely position TransUnion in the market and resonate deeply with buyers. This will include materials such as pitch decks, solution brochures, customer case studies, and competitive battlecards. Build and maintain personas and ideal customer profiles that reflect the regional and vertical market nuances. 
Market Intelligence: Conduct ongoing market, customer, and competitor analysis to inform positioning and product roadmaps, create powerful stories that resonate with the regional market and differentiate TransUnion’s propositions from the competition. 
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Influence and align stakeholders across product, sales, market development, and marketing teams to ensure go-to-market readiness across the organisation. Work tightly with the global Product Marketing team to drive and localise global launches in the Latin American market, and leverage best-practice processes and tools. 
Performance Measurement: Track and report on key performance indicators to measure the impact of product marketing. 


This is a hybrid position and involves regular performance of job responsibilities virtually as well as in-person at an assigned TU office location for a minimum of two days a week.

TransUnion Job Title

Sr Consultant, Product Marketing

description:
About the job

Description

What We’re Looking For:

The Product Marketing Specialist - Market & Competitive Intelligence role is an exciting opportunity to join a fast-growing, global company as an individual contributor with potential for people management in the future.

This role supports Meltwater’s Product Marketing team by delivering competitive intelligence, market insights, and messaging that strengthen product positioning and sales effectiveness. The position monitors market and competitor activity, develops competitive assets, and helps translate insights into product messaging and enablement materials for internal teams. Working cross-functionally with product, sales, marketing, and analyst relations, the role helps ensure teams are equipped with the insights and materials needed to effectively communicate Meltwater’s value in the market.

What You'll Do:


Competitive monitoring: Track top-tier and trade news impacting Meltwater, key competitors, and the broader market, and communicate through Slack, email, and monthly newsletters. 
Competitive Intelligence Assets: Develop and maintain competitive assets—including battle cards, research briefs, and presentations and support sales and product team requests for competitive insights. 
Analyst Relations: Support M&CI Manager with regular briefings and inquiries with industry analysts and assist with analyst research evaluations as needed. 
Product Messaging & Positioning: Incorporate competitive insights into product messaging and communicate product updates that clearly articulate customer value. 
Sales Enablement: Manage and maintain sales and marketing assets that support revenue generation across prospects and existing customers. 
Cross-functional Collaboration: Partner with the global Product Marketing team and stakeholders across product, sales, customer success, UX, partnerships, marketing, and engineering to ensure alignment. 


What You'll Bring:


Experience: 2-5 years of Product Marketing experience, ideally within a SaaS environment or an agency setting. Preference given to those with an understanding of general Product Marketing pillars of work, including: GTM, Messaging, Sales Enablement, Market & Competitive Intelligence, and Analyst Relations. Experience in public relations, communications, or analyst relations is a plus, but not required. 
Education: A bachelor's degree is required, and in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field is a plus. 
Skills:
Deep understanding of the SaaS industry, market trends, and customer needs. 
Understanding of trends and technologies shaping the Marketing, PR, Communications, and Social Media landscapes. 
Familiarity with key industry focus areas, including Social Listening & Monitoring, Influencer Marketing & Campaign Measurement, Media Intelligence, Consumer Intelligence, Artificial Intelligence (AI), and its application in Public Relations and Marketing. 
Experience with tools such as SalesHood, Gong, ChatGPT, Claude, Pendo, Intercom, ProductBoard, Salesforce, Totango, Asana, Marketo, Wistia, Loom, Miro, Frame.io, and Camtasia is advantageous. 
Knowledge: 
Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities. 
Organizational skills to manage multiple projects and deliverables. 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 
Enthusiasm for working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment with strong time management and prioritization skills. 
Comfortable presenting to internal and external audiences. 
Ability to work collaboratively across teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously. 

What We Offer:

Complimentary CalmApp subscription for you and your loved ones because mental wellness matters.


Benefits:
Enjoy private health insurance through MetLife for you and your dependents, complementing your state medical coverage
Benefit from a company-matched Savings Fund to help you grow your financial security
Receive monthly grocery vouchers to support your everyday essentials
Enjoy an additional day off on your birthday, promoting a healthy work-life balance
Benefit from our family leave program, which grows with your tenure at Meltwater. 


Thrive within our inclusive community and seize ongoing professional development opportunities to elevate your career.


Professional Development:
Access to ongoing learning opportunities, leadership development programs, and mentorship. 
Clear career progression and growth pathways within a global organization. 
Culture & Collaboration:
Energetic work environment with a hybrid work style, providing the balance you need
Opportunities for travel to industry conferences, team offsites, and Meltwater global gatherings—fostering deep connections across our international teams. 
A vibrant, fun-loving culture that celebrates wins, encourages creativity, and supports your individual success. 


Where You'll Work: Lago Alberto Street #375 Office 201 11320, Mexico City

Our Story

At Meltwater, we believe that when you have the right people in the right environment, great things happen.

Our best-in-class technology empowers our 27,000 customers around

the world to make better business decisions through data. But we can’t do that without our global team of developers, innovators, problem-solvers, and high-performers who embrace challenges and find new solutions for our customers.

Our award-winning global culture drives everything we do and creates

an environment where our employees can make an impact, learn every day, feel a sense of belonging, and celebrate each other’s successes along

the way.

We are innovators at the core who see the potential in people, ideas and technologies. Together, we challenge ourselves to go big, be bold, and build best-in-class solutions for our customers.

We’re proud of our diverse team of 2,200+ employees in 50 locations across

25 countries around the world. No matter where you are, you’ll work with people who care about your success and get the support you need to unlock new heights in your career.

We are Meltwater. Inspired by innovation, powered by people.

Equal Employment Opportunity Statement

Meltwater is an Equal Opportunity Employer and Prohibits Discrimination and Harassment of Any Kind: At Meltwater, we are dedicated to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace where every employee feels valued, respected, and empowered. We are committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity and strive to provide a work environment that is free from discrimination and harassment.

All employment decisions at Meltwater are made based on business needs, job requirements, and individual qualifications, without regard to race, color, religion or belief, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, marital status, veteran status, or any other status protected by the applicable laws and regulations.

Meltwater does not tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind, and we actively promote a culture of respect, fairness, and inclusivity. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities to apply and join us in our mission to drive innovation and make a positive impact in the world.

We may use AI to assist in aspects of our hiring process, such as reviewing candidate information, capturing interview notes, and supporting interview activities. These tools are used only to assist our team through increased efficiencies. Every output continues to be reviewed by humans, and all hiring decisions are made by humans. We remain committed to evaluating candidates fairly, consistently, and in compliance with all applicable laws.

title: Trainee de Comercial-MKT
description:
About the job

🧠 Requisitos

Sin experiencia necesaria.

IMPORTANTE E INDISPENSABLE: Recién egresadas o interés en realizar prácticas profesionales en carreras de Marketing digital, Comercial, Relaciones internacionales, Negocios internacionales o afines.

Interés en áreas de ventas, marketing digital, inteligencia comercial o similar.

Habilidad para estructurar contenidos comerciales y diseñar materiales con impacto visual y estratégico.




🧩 Responsabilidades

Desarrollar e implementar estrategias de Sales Enablement alineadas con los objetivos comerciales de Turing-IA.

Diseñar y mantener materiales de soporte a ventas: presentaciones, one-pagers, casos de uso, guiones y kits comerciales.

Implementar dashboards de inteligencia comercial y marketing para monitorear oportunidades, ciclos de ventas y desempeño por vertical.

Colaborar estrechamente con el equipo comercial para identificar brechas de contenido, oportunidades de mejora y automatizaciones necesarias.

Generar y analizar reportes de campañas de marketing digital y acciones comerciales (ABM, inbound, email marketing).

Proponer iniciativas para mejorar la conversión de leads, ciclo de ventas y retención de clientes.

Apoyar en el entrenamiento de nuevos integrantes del equipo comercial y generación de playbooks internos.

Participar en la coordinación de lanzamientos de nuevos servicios, asegurando una narrativa clara, diferenciadora y basada en valor.

Realizar investigaciones de mercado y análisis competitivo para fortalecer el posicionamiento de la empresa.




🕐 Horario

Lunes a Jueves de 9:00 am a 7:00 pm (con 1.5 horas libres)

Viernes de 9:00 am a 5:00 pm (con 1 hora libre)




💡 Beneficios

Modalidad 100% remota

Aumentos salariales programados por desempeño

Apoyo a oficina en casa a partir del segundo mes

Bonos por productividad y cumplimiento de metas comerciales

Pago de días extras al doble

Día libre en tu cumpleaños

Acceso a capacitaciones en herramientas de trabajo (Tableau, GCP, HubSpot, etc.)

Oportunidad real de crecimiento a mediano y largo plazo

Clases de inglés

Participación en proyectos con impacto real y clientes relevantes

title: Especialista de Promoción y Contenido Online
skills: Coordinar la implementación de contenido digital de productos Sony en canales digitales y marketplaces.
Asegurar la correcta carga y actualización de imágenes, descripciones, keywords y materiales comerciales en plataformas online.
Trabajar de la mano con equipos de ventas para atender solicitudes de materiales y necesidades de contenido para cada canal.
Coordinarse con agencias creativas y equipos internos para asegurar entregas en tiempo y forma.
Apoyar en iniciativas digitales, lanzamientos de producto y campañas promocionales.
Apoyar en la gestión y control del presupuesto, así como en el seguimiento de procesos administrativos (facturación y pagos a proveedores).
Brindar soporte en la organización y ejecución de eventos de lanzamiento de producto y actividades BTL.

About the job

We look for the risk-takers, the collaborators, the inspired and the inspirational. We want the people who are brave enough to work at the cutting edge and create solutions that will enrich and improve the lives of people across the globe. So, if you want to make the world say wow, let's talk.

The conversation starts here. If this role matches your ambitions and skillset, let's get started with your application. Take a look at our other open positions too. Our many opportunities can lead to infinite possibilities.

Responsabilidades

 Asegurar la correcta carga y actualización de imágenes, descripciones, keywords y materiales comerciales en plataformas online.
 Trabajar de la mano con equipos de ventas para atender solicitudes de materiales y necesidades de contenido para cada canal.
 Coordinarse con agencias creativas y equipos internos para asegurar entregas en tiempo y forma.

 Brindar soporte en la organización y ejecución de eventos de lanzamiento de producto y actividades BTL.

title: Intern, Marketing, Mexico, 2026
skills: Apoyar el desarrollo y la ejecución de campañas de marketing alineadas con la estrategia de la marca.
Colaborar en la preparación de presentaciones, informes y materiales para reuniones internas y revisiones con la dirección.
Coordinar los cronogramas de los proyectos, dar seguimiento con agencias y equipos internos, y supervisar el cumplimiento de los entregables.
Apoyar las actividades digitales y de redes sociales mediante la recopilación y análisis de métricas, el monitoreo del desempeño y la propuesta de mejoras.
Brindar apoyo en la logística y planificación de eventos, reuniones y actividades educativas.
Proporcionar soporte administrativo general al equipo de marca y garantizar el cumplimiento de los procesos internos de la empresa.
Ser estudiante activo de Mercadotecnia, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o una carrera afín.
Contar con al menos un año restante para graduarse al inicio de las prácticas profesionales.
Dominio del español y nivel avanzado de inglés, tanto oral como escrito.
Manejo de Microsoft Office, especialmente PowerPoint y Word, así como conocimientos prácticos de Excel.
Disponibilidad para trabajar de 4 a 6 horas diarias, de lunes a viernes, y compromiso para realizar prácticas profesionales durante 12 meses.
Estar inscrito en una universidad en México durante toda la duración del programa de prácticas profesionales.
Experiencia previa en prácticas profesionales o trabajo en áreas de marketing, atención médica o ciencias de la vida.
Familiaridad con herramientas de analítica digital, como Google Analytics o plataformas de métricas para redes sociales.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de colaboración, como Teams, Zoom o Webex.
Conocimientos avanzados de Excel, incluyendo el uso de tablas de datos básicas y la creación de gráficos.
Facilidad para colaborar con agencias creativas y proveedores externos.
Interés en el marketing del sector salud y motivación por generar un impacto positivo.
Remuneración económica
Vales de comida
Equipo abierto y amigable
Aprendizaje constante
description:
About the job

Ayúdanos a adelantarnos a las enfermedades junto con nuestra Área de Marketing.

Formación requerida: Actualmente cursando carreras de Marketing, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o afines.

Mínimo 1 año para terminar.

Otros requisitos: Debe estar matriculado/a en una universidad de México durante la pasantía.

Requisitos de idioma: Inglés avanzado

Fecha de inicio prevista: Agosto 2026

Periodo de prácticas: 1 año

Modelo híbrido: 2 días onsite

Fecha límite de solicitud: Recomendamos postular lo antes posible. Cerraremos esta vacante cuando tengamos suficientes solicitudes, así que aplica cuanto antes para que tu candidatura pueda ser considerada.

¿Buscas adquirir una valiosa experiencia laboral a nivel mundial y ayudar a impactar positivamente en la salud de miles de millones de personas? ¡Solicita hoy una práctica en GSK!

Una práctica en GSK te ofrece la oportunidad de impulsar tu carrera: ¡asumirás un puesto real con un impacto genuino! Realizarás un trabajo exigente y significativo en proyectos o asignaciones reales. También aprenderás con nosotros, desarrollarás tus habilidades y adquirirás una experiencia valiosa para dondequiera que te lleve el futuro.

¿Qué harás? 


Apoyar el desarrollo y la ejecución de campañas de marketing alineadas con la estrategia de la marca.
Colaborar en la preparación de presentaciones, informes y materiales para reuniones internas y revisiones con la dirección.
Coordinar los cronogramas de los proyectos, dar seguimiento con agencias y equipos internos, y supervisar el cumplimiento de los entregables.
Apoyar las actividades digitales y de redes sociales mediante la recopilación y análisis de métricas, el monitoreo del desempeño y la propuesta de mejoras.
Brindar apoyo en la logística y planificación de eventos, reuniones y actividades educativas.
Proporcionar soporte administrativo general al equipo de marca y garantizar el cumplimiento de los procesos internos de la empresa.


¿Qué estamos buscando?


Ser estudiante activo de Mercadotecnia, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o una carrera afín.
Contar con al menos un año restante para graduarse al inicio de las prácticas profesionales.
Dominio del español y nivel avanzado de inglés, tanto oral como escrito.
Manejo de Microsoft Office, especialmente PowerPoint y Word, así como conocimientos prácticos de Excel.
Disponibilidad para trabajar de 4 a 6 horas diarias, de lunes a viernes, y compromiso para realizar prácticas profesionales durante 12 meses.
Estar inscrito en una universidad en México durante toda la duración del programa de prácticas profesionales.


Deseables

Si cuentas con las siguientes características, será un valor agregado:


Experiencia previa en prácticas profesionales o trabajo en áreas de marketing, atención médica o ciencias de la vida.
Familiaridad con herramientas de analítica digital, como Google Analytics o plataformas de métricas para redes sociales.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de colaboración, como Teams, Zoom o Webex.
Conocimientos avanzados de Excel, incluyendo el uso de tablas de datos básicas y la creación de gráficos.
Facilidad para colaborar con agencias creativas y proveedores externos.
Interés en el marketing del sector salud y motivación por generar un impacto positivo.


¿Qué aprendrás?

Te incorporarás al equipo de Marketing en México como practicante, brindando apoyo en actividades de marketing relacionadas con vacunas. Colaborarás en la ejecución de campañas, el desarrollo de contenidos y la coordinación de proyectos. Trabajarás de cerca con gerentes de producto, agencias y equipos multidisciplinarios.

¿Qué te ofrecemos? 


Remuneración económica
Vales de comida
Equipo abierto y amigable
Aprendizaje constante


¡Hagámoslo realidad!

Encontrarás consejos, sugerencias y orientación sobre nuestro proceso de selección en nuestro sitio web.

Obtén más información sobre el proceso de solicitud en gsk.to/ECprocess (opcional).

Puedes aprender más sobre GSK y nuestras carreras aquí: https://www.gsk.com/en-gb/careers/

¡Postúlate ahora!

¿Necesitas ayuda con tu solicitud?

Por favor escríbenos a AM.EarlyTalentRecruitment@gsk.com y dinos cómo podemos ayudarte.

#EarlyCareers

Why GSK?

Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together.

GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale.

People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people.

If you require any type of accommodation and/or support during the selection process to better showcase your abilities (for example, access to ramps, accessible emergency exits, visual aids, etc.), please let us know when we contact you. We are here to support you.

Your application is voluntary; therefore, you understand and consent that GSK, located at Real Mayorazgo 130, Torre M, Piso 20, Col. Xoco, Benito Juárez, Mexico City, will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy in accordance with the candidate privacy notice, which can be consulted at Candidate Privacy Notice. Among the information you provide for this purpose, you may choose to give us personal data that will help ensure an inclusive selection process. Rest assured that your information will be treated with the utmost confidentiality, in compliance with applicable regulations, and will not be available to hiring managers or anyone outside the recruitment team. Help us maintain, together, an inclusive and welcoming environment. By submitting information, I confirm that I agree that it will be processed in accordance with the stated privacy notice.

Important notice to Employment businesses/ Agencies

GSK does not accept referrals from employment businesses and/or employment agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site. All employment businesses/agencies are required to contact GSK's commercial and general procurement/human resources department to obtain prior written authorization before referring any candidates to GSK. The obtaining of prior written authorization is a condition precedent to any agreement (verbal or written) between the employment business/ agency and GSK. In the absence of such written authorization being obtained any actions undertaken by the employment business/agency shall be deemed to have been performed without the consent or contractual agreement of GSK. GSK shall therefore not be liable for any fees arising from such actions or any fees arising from any referrals by employment businesses/agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site.

title: Docente de Mercadotecnia
description:
About the job

La Universidad del Valle de México está buscando tu talento como Docente de Asignaturas de Mercadotecnia




¡Únete a nuestro gran equipo!




Donde serás responsable de brindar atención académica personalizada a la comunidad estudiantil durante su estancia en la institución.




Escolaridad (título y cédula indispensable): Mercadotecnia

Principales Responsabilidades:

• Impartición de cátedra

• Elaboración de material didáctico

• Asesoría a los estudiantes en trabajos académicos




Experiencia:

• 1 año Impartiendo cátedra




Habilidades y competencias:

• Empatía

• Extrovertido

En la Universidad del Valle de México formamos personas íntegras para una vida plena y un mundo mejor.










Tu rol será parte esencial de esa transformación, contribuyendo a construir una universidad que forma líderes con propósito, que crean valor y que impactan positivamente en sus comunidades. description:
About the job

Marketing Operations Specialist







This role goes beyond content creation and supports building marketing systems, automations, CRM workflows, and reporting structures while also executing creative tasks, making it a hybrid between a marketer and operations-focused role.




Location: Latin America / Central America (speaks english & Spanish)

Hours Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Time Zone: Eastern Time (Preferred: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST, negotiable)







About Company and Role

We are a growing Florida-based roofing company focused on building a modern, system-driven marketing engine. The company is seeking a full-time Digital Marketing Assistant to support and help build internal marketing operations, systems, and workflows.




This is not a traditional virtual assistant or social media-only role. The position blends creative execution with systems thinking—combining digital marketing, CRM management, automation support, AI tools, and process development.




The selected candidate will work closely with a highly technical founder experienced in programming, automation, and data analytics. Together, they will build scalable marketing systems including content production, CRM workflows, reporting structures, automation pipelines, and




SOPs.This is a long-term opportunity with a clear path to grow into a Marketing Operations Manager role.







Key Responsibilities

Marketing Operations & Systems

Build and improve repeatable marketing workflows and processes
Organize campaigns, content calendars, assets, and reporting systems
Support and manage CRM workflows (Zoho One or similar)
Track lead sources across campaigns, referrals, social, and website
Document processes and create SOPs

Automation & Workflow Support

Assist in building and maintaining automations and pipelines
Work with CRM systems, AI tools, and integrated platforms
Test workflows and ensure accurate data flow
Identify repetitive tasks and suggest automation opportunities

Creative & Design

Create marketing assets including flyers, social posts, and ads using Canva or similar tools
Maintain consistent branding across all materials
Adapt creative for different platforms and audiences

Content, Social Media & Website

Create and schedule content across social media platforms
Develop posts, captions, blogs, emails, and website content
Repurpose content across multiple channels
Assist with website updates and basic SEO formatting

CRM, Reporting & Sales Support

Maintain CRM data, pipelines, and reporting structures
Support lead tracking and campaign performance analysis
Help create templates and follow-up sequences
Organize and interpret marketing performance data

Additional Support

Learn roofing services, terminology, and customer pain points
Assist with occasional research and operational support
Support referral partner marketing initiatives as needed







Must-Have Qualifications

Strong written and spoken English
3–5 years of hands-on experience in digital marketing, CRM, automation, or related fields
Strong design skills (Canva or similar tools)
Experience creating marketing content across platforms
Intermediate experience with automation/workflows
Hands-on experience using AI tools
CRM experience required (Zoho One preferred but not required)
High level of independence and ability to execute without constant direction
Strong organizational and systems-thinking mindset
Reliable internet, computer, and professional remote setup







Nice-to-Have Qualifications

Experience with Zoho One ecosystem
Familiarity with Microsoft Office (Excel, Word)
Experience with WordPress or website management tools
Background in home services, construction, or related industries
Basic reporting and analytics experience
Certifications in digital marketing, automation, or CRM tools

description:
About the job

¡TelevisaUnivision está en búsqueda de un Becario en Mercadotecnia para el área de Sports Marketing Connections

Ubicación: Ciudad de México (Santa Fe)

Forma parte del equipo de TelevisaUnivision, la empresa líder en el mundo de medios y contenido en español. TelevisaUnivision cuenta con la más extensa videoteca de contenido propio y es líder en capacidad de producción en el sector, lo que impulsa su contenido digital de streaming, televisión tradicional y plataformas de radio.

Somos una empresa vibrante con más de 10,000 colaboradores en México, Colombia y EE. UU. Nos une la pasión por el entretenimiento, la creatividad y los grandes hitos. En TelevisaUnivision encontrarás un ambiente amigable y lleno de equidad para crecer personal y profesionalmente.

Dirigido a estudiantes que desean cumplir con sus prácticas profesionales o servicio social en un entorno corporativo, esta experiencia representa una excelente oportunidad para aplicar tus conocimientos en la práctica.

Esta experiencia formativa no contempla compensación económica, pero brinda acceso a procesos reales y acompañamiento profesional por parte de un equipo altamente capacitado.

¡Únete y sé parte de este gran equipo dinámico!

Acerca del puesto y equipo

Formarás parte del equipo de Sports Marketing Connections, encargado de diseñar flyers comunicando la transmisión de diferentes Shows Deportivos y Eventos Deportivos asi como dar seguimiento a campañas activas de los clientes confirmados. Este equipo trabaja de la mano con el equipo de ventas Televisaunivision y áreas internas para desarrollar propuestas creativas y asegurar la correcta ejecución de proyectos especiales.

Sobre ti

Como Becario en Sports Marketing Connections, apoyarás en la elaboración de comunicados internos para dar a conocer la información de transmisión de diferentes Shows y Eventos en vivo. Tendrás la oportunidad de aprender sobre procesos comerciales, seguimiento de campañas y elaboración de materiales gráficos de acuerdo a la campaña activa y comunicación de cada uno de los clientes.

Tu Día a Día Incluirá


Crear comunicados internos. 
Aportar ideas creativas para el desarrollo de campañas de clientes dentro de Shows y Eventos Deportivos.
Apoyar en el seguimiento de materiales gráficos de los clientes, de la mano de los editores. 
Buscar y recopilar testigos de las campañas.
Realizar búsqueda de “Patrocinadores Oficiales” de los diferentes torneos deportivos y equipos. 
Apoyar en el segumiento de la comercialización para eventos deportivos.


Tu deberías de tener


Estudiante de últimos semestres de Licenciatura en Comunicación, Mercadotecnia, Publicidad o Diseño.
Manejo de paquetería Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word) y app para edición de comunicados.
Actitud proactiva, disposición para aprender y buenas habilidades de comunicación.
Interés en desarrollar tu carrera profesional en el área deportiva.
Conocimiento de los diferentes deportes como LigaMX (Varonil / Femenil), La Liga, Box, NFL, F1, etc.
Disponibilidad para realizar tu servicio social o prácticas profesionales de manera presencial en Santa Fe.


Lo Que Te Ofrecemos

Experiencia práctica en una empresa líder en medios y entretenimiento

Experiencia práctica en procesos reales de adquisición de talento.

Ambiente de trabajo colaborativo y profesional

Oportunidad de desarrollo y aprendizaje continuo

Nuestro compromiso con la inclusión

TelevisaUnivision es un empleador que ofrece igualdad de oportunidades. Todos los solicitantes calificados serán considerados para el empleo sin distinción de sexo, identidad de género, orientación sexual, raza, color, religión, nacionalidad, discapacidad, edad o cualquier otra característica protegida por la ley.

title: Regional Campaign Lead, LATAM
description:
About the job

What To Expect
Tesla is seeking an experienced and strategic Regional Campaign Lead to join our Latinamerica Sales and Delivery Organization, supporting the Field Sales team. In this high-impact role, you will lead regional development, execution, and optimization of strategic outbound programs and campaigns designed to increase brand awareness and increase market penetration. This includes responsibilitiesrelated to but not limited to scaling Events, Self-Serve, and Media opportunities.

As a Regional Campaign Lead, you will have a rare opportunity to scale several high impact top of funnel programs. This key role will drive cross-functional alignment, manage complex initiatives, and build robust strategies to grow regional market share. Understanding and evaluating performance and KPI’s is critical to the success of the program. You will partner closely with internal stakeholders to ensure program success from start to finish.

What You'll Do


Lead end-to-end strategy planning, coordination, and delivery of high-impact events, media opportunities, and self-serve expansion across a region, ensuring alignment with leadership, company goals, and stakeholder expectations
Exercise independent judgement to resolve logistical or operational challenges that may arise during event planning and event execution ensuring the proposed solution has Tesla’s best interest in mind
Manage relationships with business partners, vendors, local media and cross-functional teams to enhance event logistics, resources, and community engagement while driving regional growth
Take ownership in negotiating with external stakeholders to bring opportunities to leadership that significantly propel Tesla in achieving our mission
Monitor event KPIs, conduct post-event reviews, and implement data-driven insights to refine processes and scale successful regional strategies to drive market growth
Become a leader in top-of-funnel initiatives in your region, providing strategy suggestions and insights to leadership to shape the regional growth curve
Manage regional budgets and optimize resource allocation to support regional growth objectives



What You'll Bring


Bachelor’s Degree in Communications, Marketing, Project Management, or equivalent experience with 4+ years in a similar demand generation, marketing or strategic program management roles
Expertise in strategic planning, execution, and optimization of demand generation programs, with experience collaborating and advising senior leadership for decision-making reports and presentations. This role requires independent judgement and strategic decision-making
Experienced in negotiating partnerships and contracts with third-party vendors to drive growth with little oversight. With proficiency in budget management and resource allocation for scalable Top of funnel market growth programs
Strong ability to manage multiple projects with attention to detail and deadlines, while adapting to changing priorities in a fast-paced ambiguous environment
Strong leadership, communication, and relationship management skills – with the ability to build relationships quickly both internally and externally – with the ability to represent Tesla to external partners. Advanced analytical skills to evaluate opportunities both past and future using data, trends and tools to calculate effectiveness of opportunities
Valid driver’s license and flexibility to work evenings, weekends, and holidays as required. Passion for Tesla’s mission and a deep understanding of the customer journey and sales cycle
75% of the time dedicated to strategic planning, stakeholder management, and budget optimization. Travel may be required up to 50% of the time to execute high-impact regional strategies and build stakeholder relationships



, Tesla

description:
About the job

Job Title: SEO & WordPress Specialist
Work Hours: Full-time (40 hours per week)
Schedule/Timezone: Monday to Friday / EST Timezone
Location: 100% Remote, (Latin America Only)




Overview 




Stop chasing algorithms and start driving measurable growth. We are looking for a data-driven SEO expert to take the wheel of a diverse client portfolio within a high-performance digital marketing agency.




Our agency is a results-first digital marketing powerhouse specializing in SEO, web development, and PPC. We pride ourselves on delivering tangible, high-impact results for a large portfolio of international clients. We are built on a culture of continuous improvement, technical excellence, and proactive problem-solving.




As our newest team member, you will step into a fast-paced environment where your expertise in platform-driven optimization and WordPress management will directly influence the success of dozens of businesses.




Key Responsibilities




Overseeing and enhancing SEO performance across a large and diverse range of client accounts
Utilizing Search Atlas to perform weekly SEO audits, monitor rankings, and identify growth opportunities
Updating and maintaining WordPress sites to ensure peak usability and SEO health
Implementing on-page SEO strategies, including metadata, keyword optimization, internal linking, and technical fixes
Analyzing performance metrics and transform complex SEO data into clear, actionable strategy steps
Managing site health, indexing, schema, and emerging technical SEO opportunities
Working closely with internal teams to ensure best practices are applied consistently across all projects




Must-Have Requirements




Proven track record in SEO, preferably within a fast-paced agency setting
Strong hands-on experience with Search Atlas (or comparable advanced SEO platforms) and WordPress
Demonstrated ability to manage multiple client accounts and prioritize tasks effectively
Deep understanding of on-page SEO, technical SEO, keyword tracking, and reporting
Ability to interpret data and turn it into execution
A strong willingness to learn, grow, and take ownership of results




Nice-to-Have Requirements




Tool Proficiency: Familiarity with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console, and Google Analytics
Global Context: Experience working directly with U.S.-based clients
Advanced Tech: Knowledge of schema, site speed optimization, and specific technical SEO fixes
Complementary Skills: Basic understanding of PPC or web development




Why Join Us 




This is more than just a back-end role; it is an opportunity to join a team that values transparency, measurable success, and professional evolution. You’ll be working with a large-scale portfolio that keeps your day-to-day work exciting and varied. We offer a remote-first culture that respects your time zone and provides the tools you need to succeed. If you are a detail-oriented specialist who thrives on seeing your optimizations move the needle, we want to talk to you.

description:
About the job

Descripción Empresa

El Puerto de Liverpool es la empresa líder en tiendas departamentales en México. Con más de 170 años en el mercado, nos dedicamos a facilitar la selección de productos y brindarles el mejor servicio a las familias mexicanas, esperando superar las expectativas de calidad, moda, valor y atención dentro de un ambiente agradable. Contamos con oficinas centrales, más de 100 tiendas departamentales, centros comerciales, boutiques, centros de distribución y bodegas logística.

Nuestra misión es servir al cliente en todo lugar, todos los días, toda la vida, nuestra visión es ser la mejor opción en servicio, surtido y valor. Nuestros valores nos guían hacia el trabajo en equipo, productividad, innovación e integridad.

Somos una empresa innovadora y en constante evolución, sabemos la importancia de transformar a nuestros negocios a través de nuestros colaboradores.

Misión Del Cargo

Diseñar la estrategia integral de Paid Media full-funnel para todas las marcas y verticales de negocio de Liverpool.

Funciones Del Cargo

Supervisar la correcta ejecución de los planes de Paid Media

Liderar la estrategia de SEO y GEO, asegurando visibilidad orgánica y posicionamiento en motores de búsqueda y plataformas de IA generativa.

Garantizar que las iniciativas de medios digitales cumplan los objetivos de crecimiento de tráfico, conversión y rentabilidad (ROAS omnicanal).

Impulsar una agenda de experimentación

Lugar de trabajo: Santa Fe

Decide el horario que mejor se adapte a tus necesidades:

Contamos Con Horario Híbrido, Una Parte De Tu Día Trabajarás En El Corporativo y Por La Tarde De Manera Remota

Lunes a Jueves: corporativo 7:00 a 13:00 hrs. / remoto 16:00 a 18:00 hrs. / Viernes: corporativo 7:00 a 13:00 hrs.

¡Te invitamos a vivir la experiencia!

Requisitos


Licenciatura en Marketing, Administración de empresas, Economía, Actuaría, Ing. Industrial, etc.
Conocimiento de Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, programática
Inglés Avanzado
Experiencia en retail, eCommerce, fintech, travel o industrias de alto volumen
Mínimo 7 años de experiencia en marketing digital con enfoque en Paid Media a escala


Beneficios

Condiciones oferta:

Somos una empresa innovadora y en constante evolución y sabemos la importancia de transformar a nuestros negocios a través de nuestros colaboradores.

Los colaboradores son el eje central de nuestra cultura y buscamos brindar un lugar atractivo para trabajar, en el cual, la inclusión, calidad de vida y bienestar son fundamentales para su desarrollo profesional.

La diversidad es vista y vivida como parte del éxito.

Trabajamos todos los días para tener un ambiente de constante aprendizaje y retos profesionales e Incentivamos al colaborador a ser dueño de su carrera profesional.

Brindamos programas de desarrollo constantes para habilidades blandas y técnicas.

La Universidad Virtual Liverpool (UVL), ofrece la posibilidad de seguir preparándose al estudiar una licenciatura, maestría o perfeccionar el idioma inglés.

Los beneficios por ser parte de nuestra vida (SGMM, utilidades garantizadas, bono por resultados, caja de ahorro, vales de despensa y descuentos especiales).

Descripción Proceso De Selección

El proceso de selección se realiza a través de AIRA - plataforma de reclutamiento diseñado para mejorar tu experiencia de postulación.

Para Postular Solo Necesitas


 Postular a la oferta
 Revisar tu mail
 Ingresar a AIRA y contestar las preguntas y/o pruebas solicitadas


Luego, si vemos que tu perfil se ajusta a lo que estamos buscando, te contactaremos por mail (a través de AIRA) para seguir a la etapa presencial.

description:
About the job

Condé Nast is a global media company producing the highest quality content with a footprint of more than 1 billion consumers in 32 territories through print, digital, video and social platforms. The company’s portfolio includes many of the world’s most respected and influential media properties including Vogue, Vanity Fair, Glamour, Self, GQ, The New Yorker, Condé Nast Traveler/Traveller, Allure, AD, Bon Appétit and Wired, among others.

Job Description

Location:

Ciudad de México, CMX

Condé Nast is a global media company, home to iconic brands including Vogue, The New Yorker, GQ, Glamour, AD, Vanity Fair and Wired, among many others. The company's award-winning content reaches 84 million consumers in print, 367 million in digital and 379 million across social platforms, and generates more than 1 billion video views each month.

The company is headquartered in London and New York, and operates in 32 markets worldwide, including China, France, Germany, India, Italy, Japan, Mexico & Latin America, Spain, Taiwan, the UK and the USA, with local license partners across the globe.

What we’re looking for:

A Workday Engineer I to support the critical work of maintaining and evolving our Workday platform within a full tenant implementation. You will work within a broader Workday team that supports key business objectives by working with business stakeholders, project leads, and cross functional technology teams to build, test and deliver key technology efforts. The ideal candidate has foundational engineering skills with experience in Workday, specifically integrations and studio development, as well strong communication and interpersonal skills. The ideal candidate enjoys working in a dynamic, global, team-oriented environment and has keen attention to detail and the ability to collaborate with a diverse group of stakeholders across various business functions.

Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:


Support creation and updating basic reports and BIRT layouts
Foundational knowledge of Workday business process configuration including validation rules
Foundational understanding of Workday Security Fundamentals
Support creation and/or configuration of standard Workday Core Connections
Support the creation and configuration of Workday EIBs as well as how to load data using EIB processes
Foundational knowledge of software development, engineering, etc.
Strong ability to learn troubleshooting skills
Leverage knowledge of customer support principals, and best practices to provide best in class service to our internal customers
Engage with vendors as needed for support related to the platform
Support new Workday release activities relating to the needs of the business and impact assessment


Essential Skills & Requirements:


1+ years supporting Workday or similar experiences in other ERPs
Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a dynamic, flexible environment
Experience with ticketing systems and enterprise collaboration tools
Excellent interpersonal skills and strong customer service orientation
Highly self-motivated, self-directed, and attentive to detail
Demonstrated ability to work with cross-functional teams


What happens next?

If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply below, and we will review your application as soon as possible. You can update your resume or upload a cover letter at any time by accessing your candidate profile.

Condé Nast is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, age, familial status and other legally protected characteristics.

description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Our product portfolio, which includes 22 of the world's most iconic brands, such as Sabritas, Gamesa, Quaker, Pepsi, Gatorade and Sonrics, has been a part of Mexican homes for more than 116 years.

A career at PepsiCo means working in a culture where all people are welcome. Here, you can dare to be you. No matter who you are, where you're from, or who you love, you can always influence the people around you and make a positive impact in the world.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

The Accounts Payable Analyst processes PO requests, processes invoices for payment, sets up new suppliers, assists with uniform ordering process, and provides Perm Merch Ordering/Tracking support for Division GTM organization for PBNA.

Your Impact

As R2P Analyst your functions would consist of …


Support of Requisition to Pay and Invoice Processing tasks including, but not limited to: (Making Decisions, Executing Actions)
Timely and Accurate PO Request Submission via Supplier Portal
Timely and Accurate Invoice Processing for Payment via MyBuy
Research, Troubleshoot, and Resubmit any Invoice Issues
Analyze any trends with invoice processing to identify root causes, and areas of improvement
Manage Supplier Set-up Process, ensuring all critical inputs are gathered from field teams and suppliers, and processed (Executing Actions, Providing Consultation)
Manage Perm Merch Process, working with Division Perm Merch Lead and Field Sales Reps to ensure all deadlines and deliverables are met (Executing Actions, Providing Consultation)
Assist with Uniform Ordering Process, following PO Request and Invoice Processing steps along with coordination with local hiring team (Executing Actions)
Provide Field Location Leaders with ad-hoc support as needed, and periodic updates on process improvement opportunities (Providing Consultation,


Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?


Fluent in English
Bachelor’s degree in Business/Control/Operations
Ability to work within strict deadlines, learn new processes quickly, work effectively with a team and adapt to constantly evolving work responsibilities
Must have strong analytical and problem-solving skills to formulate effective action plans to deal with issues proactively
Fluent with data, and proven ability to utilize Excel to extract necessary data when needed
Exceptional organizational skills to handle the high volume of requests
Ability to effectively communicate in a professional and constructive manner internally and with customers
Advanced/Proficient Computer Skills (Outlook, Word, Power Point, Excel)
Strong passion for customer service 
Ability to effectively interact and build a favorable business relationship with internal and external customers
Strong team player and committed to teamwork in all situations
Excellent written and oral communications skills
Demonstrated ability to leveraging system and tools
Meticulous attention to detail


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs.
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning.
Development programs according to Leadership skills.
Specialized training according to the role.
Learning experiences with internal and external providers.
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others.
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life.
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle.
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others.


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Business Development Specialist III
skills: Identificar y adquirir flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis a través de diversos métodos como eventos, reclutamiento de campo, inteligencia de mercado y segmentación de prospectos.

Resolver las solicitudes y escalamientos de los socios de flota de manera oportuna y dar seguimiento a las recomendaciones implementadas.
Analizar y rastrear las tendencias y problemas de rendimiento de las flotas, contactándolas proactivamente para ofrecer soluciones que impulsen su eficiencia.
Ser un experto en tu zona y la persona de referencia en tu área de especialidad (Gestión y Soporte de Flotas), compartiendo aprendizajes e información, y ofreciendo recomendaciones.
Apoyar en los procesos con el fin de optimizar la adquisición y el compromiso (engagement) de nuestros socios.
Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación.
Colaborar con diferentes equipos y partes interesadas clave en Uber (Operaciones, Soporte al Cliente, etc.).
Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación.
Experiencia en roles de atención directa al cliente.
Idioma inglés: Básico; Idioma español: Fluido.
Fuertes habilidades de comunicación con capacidad para adaptar el enfoque según se trate de partes interesadas internas o externas.
Sólidas habilidades analíticas y atención al detalle; capacidad para ver tanto "el panorama general" como los detalles minuciosos.
Visión de negocio: Comprender las interrelaciones de las métricas operativas clave, así como el impacto que las decisiones empresariales tienen sobre estas.
Ser organizado, decidido y poseer capacidad de pensamiento crítico.
Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps).
Experiencia previa en Ventas, B2B o Key Account Management.

description:
About the job

Sobre el Puesto 

Estamos buscando a una persona altamente motivada y orientada a resultados para unirse a nuestro equipo de Fleet Support Team. Este rol crítico combina la adquisición estratégica con la gestión dedicada de cuentas para impulsar el crecimiento de flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis. Serás una pieza fundamental para expandir nuestro negocio de vehículos en México, construyendo relaciones a largo plazo y de alto impacto con nuestros socios más estratégicos, asegurando su exitosa adquisición, incorporación y crecimiento sostenido en la plataforma. Este rol aprovechará un enfoque hiperlocal y presencial, operando desde una estructura de Greenlight y alineándose estrechamente con nuestro equipo de operaciones.

 Lo que harás 


 Identificar y adquirir flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis a través de diversos métodos como eventos, reclutamiento de campo, inteligencia de mercado y segmentación de prospectos. 
 Mantener una comunicación frecuente a través de diferentes canales con las Cuentas (Flotas) asignadas. 
 Resolver las solicitudes y escalamientos de los socios de flota de manera oportuna y dar seguimiento a las recomendaciones implementadas. 
 Analizar y rastrear las tendencias y problemas de rendimiento de las flotas, contactándolas proactivamente para ofrecer soluciones que impulsen su eficiencia. 
 Ser un experto en tu zona y la persona de referencia en tu área de especialidad (Gestión y Soporte de Flotas), compartiendo aprendizajes e información, y ofreciendo recomendaciones. 
 Apoyar en los procesos con el fin de optimizar la adquisición y el compromiso (engagement) de nuestros socios. 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 
 Colaborar con diferentes equipos y partes interesadas clave en Uber (Operaciones, Soporte al Cliente, etc.). 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 


 Lo que necesitarás 


 Experiencia en roles de atención directa al cliente. 
 Idioma inglés: Básico; Idioma español: Fluido. 
 Fuertes habilidades de comunicación con capacidad para adaptar el enfoque según se trate de partes interesadas internas o externas. 
 Sólidas habilidades analíticas y atención al detalle; capacidad para ver tanto "el panorama general" como los detalles minuciosos. 
 Visión de negocio: Comprender las interrelaciones de las métricas operativas clave, así como el impacto que las decisiones empresariales tienen sobre estas. 
 Ser organizado, decidido y poseer capacidad de pensamiento crítico. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps). 


 Calificaciones Preferidas 


 Experiencia previa en Ventas, B2B o Key Account Management. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps).

title: Account Executive
skills: Sells a subset of product or services directly or via partners to a customers base (provided target account list) in designated geographical territory (Tier 1 (B) in region).
Develop solution proposals encompassing all aspects of the application.
Manage sales through forecasting, account resource allocation, account strategy, and planning.
Participate in the development, presentation and sales of a value proposition.
Negotiate pricing and contractual agreement to close the sale.
Support end-to-end client relationship for the first 12 rolling months (including NRR, cross-sell, upsell & acquisitions).
Maintain a mature approach to account acquisitions for the duration of first 12 months following the service acquisition.
Build and maintain strong client relationships and serve as a trusted partner to your clients maintain account health
As a Leading contributor individually and as a team member, provide direction and mentoring to others.
Work is non-routine and very complex, involving the application of advanced technical/business skills in area of specialization.
At least 05 years' experience in sales management role.
Experience in software or technology sales preferred (SaaS).
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and PowerPoint.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team, with a high level of professionalism and attention to detail.

Financial rewards & recognition - A fair compensation aligned with your experience, industry, and market standards, performance-driven bonuses, regular reviews to support your growth and recognize your contributions, and a culture that values your impact.
Flexible work arrangements - We combine in-person collaboration with remote work and flexible working hours, because great ideas happen everywhere - and not always between 9 and 5.
ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan) - As an Infobip employee, you’ll have the opportunity to share in our company’s success through stock options.
Work-life balance and Well-being  - We offer time off when you need it, special leave days for life’s big moments, and a flexible hybrid work model tailored to local regulations.
Career mobility - Your career is a journey. With internal mobility, upskilling, and mentorship, we help you shape your path.
Professional development - Learning never stops. Onboarding, mentorship, and training programs help you grow - no matter where you start.

International mobility - Ready to take your career global? Explore short and long-term opportunities in our Hubs worldwide.  While some benefits may vary by location, our goal remains the same: to support your growth, well-being, and success - wherever you are.  Diversity drives connection
description:
About the job

Working at Infobip means being part of something truly global. With 75+ offices across six continents, we’re not just building technology — we’re shaping how more than 80% of the world connects and communicates.

As employees, we take pride in contributing to the world’s largest and only full-stack cloud communication platform. But it’s not just what we do, it’s how we do it: with curiosity, passion, and a whole lot of collaboration.

We operate with an AI-first mindset, embedding intelligent tools into our daily workflows to work smarter and more efficiently. Every role here benefits from and contributes to this approach.

If you're looking for meaningful work and challenges that grow you in a culture where people show up with purpose, this is your opportunity.

Let’s build what’s next, together.

Job Description

The Account Executive is an individual contributor role in regional structure with direct reporting line towards Chapter Lead. The main goal for this role is to identify new business opportunities with current leads/clients and prospective new key clients which are provided against a focus target list. Account executive sells Infobip’s product/service offering to its High touch clients in the designated area and proactively recommend solutions to our clients. They are responsible for keeping the CRM system up to date with the information on the progress with each prospect or the client. Account Executives should work closely with relevant stakeholders internally to ensure acquisition of new business and logos.

Main Responsibilities


Sells a subset of product or services directly or via partners to a customers base (provided target account list) in designated geographical territory (Tier 1 (B) in region).
Develop solution proposals encompassing all aspects of the application.
Manage sales through forecasting, account resource allocation, account strategy, and planning.
Participate in the development, presentation and sales of a value proposition.
Negotiate pricing and contractual agreement to close the sale.
Support end-to-end client relationship for the first 12 rolling months (including NRR, cross-sell, upsell & acquisitions).
Maintain a mature approach to account acquisitions for the duration of first 12 months following the service acquisition.
Build and maintain strong client relationships and serve as a trusted partner to your clients maintain account health
As a Leading contributor individually and as a team member, provide direction and mentoring to others.
Work is non-routine and very complex, involving the application of advanced technical/business skills in area of specialization.


Job Qualifications


At least 05 years' experience in sales management role.
Experience in software or technology sales preferred (SaaS).
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and PowerPoint.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team, with a high level of professionalism and attention to detail.


Why you'll love it here


 Financial rewards & recognition - A fair compensation aligned with your experience, industry, and market standards, performance-driven bonuses, regular reviews to support your growth and recognize your contributions, and a culture that values your impact.
 Flexible work arrangements - We combine in-person collaboration with remote work and flexible working hours, because great ideas happen everywhere - and not always between 9 and 5.
 ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan) - As an Infobip employee, you’ll have the opportunity to share in our company’s success through stock options.
 Work-life balance and Well-being  - We offer time off when you need it, special leave days for life’s big moments, and a flexible hybrid work model tailored to local regulations.
 Career mobility - Your career is a journey. With internal mobility, upskilling, and mentorship, we help you shape your path. 
 Professional development - Learning never stops. Onboarding, mentorship, and training programs help you grow - no matter where you start.
 International mobility - Ready to take your career global? Explore short and long-term opportunities in our Hubs worldwide.  While some benefits may vary by location, our goal remains the same: to support your growth, well-being, and success - wherever you are.  Diversity drives connection 


Infobip is built on diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and talents. We’re proud to be an equal-opportunity employer and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace.

No matter your race, gender, age, background, or identity — if you have the passion and skills to thrive, there’s a place for you here.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, national origin, citizenship, disability, veteran status or any other part of one's identity. 

Read more about our hiring process.

description:
About the job

About Docplanner

At Docplanner Group, we’re on a mission to help people live longer, healthier lives. As the world’s largest healthcare platform, each month, we connect 24 million patients with 280k doctors across 13 countries (through brands like ZnanyLekarz, Doctoralia, MioDottore, DoktorTakvimi, and Jameda).

Our marketplaces, SaaS and AI tools simplify daily tasks and help doctors, clinics and hospitals work more efficiently, so they can focus on what really matters: caring for their patients.

Role overview

The Commercial Insights Analyst supports the Commercial Product Operations Manager by

generating structured insights that help Sales and Customer Success improve acquisition,

retention, and expansion outcomes at Doctoralia México.

This role focuses on transforming commercial data into actionable recommendations. The

analyst works across Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, and Operations teams to analyze

performance trends, identify improvement opportunities, and support data-informed decision making.

The role is expected to progressively move from ad-hoc reporting toward deeper analytical work that explains performance drivers and proposes measurable improvement initiatives.

This is not a Business Intelligence reporting-only role.

Key Responsibilities


 Strategic Analysis & Insights
Analyze commercial performance across the customer lifecycle, focusing on: Definition of ICP, Retention and churn drivers, Customer engagement and usage patterns, Expansion and upsell opportunities, Pricing and packaging performance
Develop structured analyses that move beyond descriptive reporting into explanation of


performance drivers. Translate analytical findings into clear recommendations for Sales and Customer Success leadership.


 Commercial Performance Monitoring
Develop and maintain analytical frameworks that monitor key commercial metrics such as: Sales productivity indicators, Customer acquisition efficiency, Customer retention and churn, Expansion revenue.
Ensure metrics are consistently defined and comparable across time periods. Provide clear narrative explanations of performance trends. Monitor initiative performance and track measurable business impact
 Business Decision Support
Partner with the Commercial Product Operations Manager and commercial leadership to support strategic projects with structured analysis, quantify potential impact of proposed initiatives, validate hypotheses using commercial data, build business cases for operational improvements


🎯Qualifications


Experience: 1–3 years of experience in analytics, strategy, consulting, or commercial insights roles analyzing business performance in Sales, Customer Success, or revenue-generating environments
ADN Tech: You are highly comfortable working in Startup, Consulting, or Commercial environments.
Tech Stack: Advanced in Excel/Sheets, Power BI, Tableau y Salesforce or equivalent commercial platforms
Soft Skills: Experience translating data analysis into business recommendations, analytical, 
Language: Fluent in English


Value Proposition (Compensation & Benefits)

We offer a high-performance environment with a competitive benefits package:

🏠 Hybrid Work Model

The perfect balance between the energy of the office and the comfort of working from home.

🌴 Real Time Off

22 vacation days starting from year one + your birthday off to celebrate your special day.

🏥 Health First

Comprehensive Major Medical Insurance for your peace of mind.

💰 Financial Benefits & Perks

Savings Fund, Grocery Vouchers, And Additional Monthly Benefits.

💪 Wellbeing Matters

Access to TotalPass & iFeel memberships to support your physical and emotional wellbeing.

🌍 Global Culture

Professional growth opportunities within an international company operating in more than 13 countries.

Are you ready to transform the healthcare industry in Mexico? We’d love to meet you!

title: AI Adoption Specialist
description:
About the job

Job Summary

AI Adoption Specialist

Lead business case identification and prioritization based on impact feasibility and alignment with organizational goals
